34630045.translation: It looks like Slack is running from the installer file. To help it run properly, we can move it over to your Applications directory.

46843414.translation: “You’re about to share the file ‘{fileName}’ with others in the channel ‘{channelId}’. Proceed?”

136710364.translation: This is likely due to a slow network. We can either wait, reload or restart to attempt to recover. If this doesn’t help, get in touch with support.

563969361.translation: You’ve got the latest version of Slack; thanks for staying on the ball.

915428966.translation:
Slack stopped responding.

We can reload to attempt to recover. If this doesn’t help, get in touch with support.

1332677186.translation: Slack can’t open that kind of file.

1360240177.translation: ​​To begin recording a net log, Slack must restart. Click on ‘Got it’ and then reopen Slack.

1522592627.translation: Unfortunately, Slack doesn’t seem to have the right permissions to update itself.

1567656214.translation: This will sign you out from all of your workspaces, reset the app to its original state and restart it.

1588876707.translation: If the problem persists, you can report an issue or contact us at feedback@slack.com.

1704747187.translation: Check your internet connection and contact support if this issue persists.

1793743312.translation: This is a {fileExt} file and will open in {appName}. Make sure that you trust this file before opening it directly.

2336911271.translation: The recorded net log will be included with other log files when exported.

2810434478.translation: In a second or two, Slack is going to ask for permission to update. You need to use an admin account to approve the request.

2896655900.notes: double ampersand is for windows platform. if translated string does not need ampersand can ignore it.

3371422740.translation: This will sign you out from all of your workspaces, reset the app to its original state and exit.

3389709572.translation: ​​Restart Slack now to record a net log?

3410109026.translation: This will save a log file to Slack’s download location. Continue?

3436506706.translation: This is a {fileExt} file and will open in a different application. Make sure that you trust this file before opening it directly.

3470779642.translation: We can reload to attempt to recover. If this doesn’t help, get in touch with support.

3549285835.translation: Slack is having trouble loading. This is likely due to a slow network. We can either wait, reload or restart to attempt to recover. If this doesn’t help, get in touch with support.

3940220280.translation: We’re terribly sorry, but we’ve run into trouble and need to restart Slack.
